case_title: FENDY HARDJOJO VS. STEPHON STEWART et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, STEPHON DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEWART, STEPHON DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 93 6TH STREET #16, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP SECTION 415.46
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARDJOJO, FENDY SERVED DEC-05-2001, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARDJOJO, FENDY AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, STEPHON DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, STEPHON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARDJOJO, FENDY SERVED DEC-05-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, STEPHON
